hero.headline: STOP GUESSING. START SCALING.
hero.subhead: The Revenue Engine Architect for high-growth enterprises. I don't just build websites; I build commercial infrastructure that converts.

ideology.title: The 5-Stage Revenue Journey
ideology.description: Most businesses are broken. They have pieces, but no engine. We fix the flow.

stages.title: Awareness
stages.desc: The Initial Discovery. Logic: 'I have a problem.'

stages.title: Consideration
stages.desc: The Evaluation Phase. Logic: 'Who can solve it?'

stages.title: Decision
stages.desc: The Final Validation. Logic: 'Show me the roadmap.'

stages.title: Conversion
stages.desc: The Seamless Activation. Logic: 'Wow, this works.'

stages.title: Retention
stages.desc: The Strategic Partnership. Logic: 'You have to try this.'

testimonials.quote: Richard didn't just build a site; he fixed our entire sales process. The RJAT tool alone is worth the investment.
testimonials.author: Sarah Jenkins

testimonials.quote: The definition of a force multiplier. Our operational efficiency doubled in 90 days, and our lead quality skyrocketed.
testimonials.author: Marcus Thorne

case_studies.title: Scaling SaaS to Series B
case_studies.description: Rebuilt their fragmented HubSpot setup into a unified Revenue Engine.

case_studies.title: Automating Agency Operations
case_studies.description: Implemented the 5-Stage Journey to automate client onboarding and reporting.

about.title: The Architect
about.bio: I am Richard Norwood. I fuse Design, Logic, and Capital into a single Revenue Architecture. I don't work with everyone. I work with those ready to build an engine.
